description: 20 IT scenarios — Set AA (slow stable test run)

cases.title: Account Locked After Wrong Password
cases.description: Entered wrong password five times and Active Directory account is locked. Need unlock to access email.

cases.title: Malware Email Attachment Opened
cases.description: Security incident: user opened Word macro attachment from unknown sender. Defender flagged suspicious behavior.

cases.title: Cannot Reach Internal Git Server
cases.description: Developers cannot SSH or HTTPS to git.corp.local from office network. Connection timed out since switch maintenance.

cases.title: Postgres Connection Pool Exhausted
cases.description: Application logs show FATAL: sorry, too many clients already on Postgres prod cluster. Checkout API returning 500.

cases.title: OneNote Sync Error 0x8004de40
cases.description: OneNote on Windows shows sync error 0x8004de40. Notes not syncing to SharePoint notebook.

cases.title: Docking Station Ethernet Port Dead
cases.description: Thunderbolt dock powers laptop but Ethernet port stopped working. Wi-Fi on laptop works fine.

cases.title: Leaked AWS Access Key in GitHub
cases.description: Security incident: GitHub secret scanning found AWS access key committed to public fork. Key must be rotated immediately.

cases.title: Guest Wi-Fi Captive Portal Broken
cases.description: Guest Wi-Fi connects but captive portal page never loads. Visitors cannot get internet access in lobby.

cases.title: SAP Password Reset Link Broken
cases.description: SAP Fiori password reset email link goes to 404 page. Cannot log in to submit expense reports.

cases.title: NetApp Volume Snapshot Full
cases.description: NetApp volume snapshot reserve at 100%. Cannot create new snapshots for nightly backup on vol_eng.

cases.title: Adobe Acrobat Crashes Opening PDF
cases.description: Adobe Acrobat DC crashes every time opening large PDF contracts. Other PDF readers work on same files.

cases.title: Headset Microphone Not Detected
cases.description: Jabra headset mic not detected in Windows sound settings. Headphones play audio but Teams cannot hear me.

cases.title: Unauthorized RDP From External IP
cases.description: Security incident: firewall log shows RDP attempts and one successful login from Russia to jump host JUMP-01.

cases.title: DNS Reverse Lookup Failing
cases.description: Reverse DNS PTR records missing for new server subnet. Mail server rejecting outbound email from new app servers.

cases.title: Contractor Badge Not Synced to AD
cases.description: Contractor badge works on doors but AD account not in required security group for building 3 lab access.

cases.title: Redis Sentinel Failover Loop
cases.description: Redis Sentinel cluster in continuous failover loop. Cache reads intermittently failing for session store.

cases.title: Laptop Fan Loud Grinding Noise
cases.description: Laptop fan making loud grinding noise and overheating during video calls. CPU usage normal in Task Manager.

cases.title: Power BI Report Refresh Timeout
cases.description: Power BI scheduled dataset refresh times out after 30 minutes. Dashboard stale for sales leadership.

cases.title: SharePoint External Sharing Blocked
cases.description: Cannot share SharePoint folder externally with client — sharing policy blocks guest access. Need exception for project Alpha.

cases.title: DLP Alert Credit Card Numbers in Email
cases.description: Security incident: DLP flagged outbound email containing 200 credit card numbers in attached spreadsheet.
